doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The memo contradicts actual Florida law on LFO requirements, cites a nonexistent "Jones v. DeSantis" case, and reflects a policy reversal the Division of Elections has not issued.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This contradicts actual Florida law (Amendment 4 and §98.0751 still require LFO payment), cites a nonexistent case "Jones v. DeSantis," and contains policy reversals Florida's Department of State has not issued.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The memo contradicts actual Florida law on LFO requirements, cites a nonexistent "Jones v. DeSantis" case, and reflects a policy reversal the Division of Elections has not issued.
